name: Lebanese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixer bowl, beat the cooking oil into the softened butter until blended.
2. Beat in the sugar, orange juice, baking powder, and baking soda until well combined.
3. Gradually add flour to form a soft dough.
4. Shape the dough into 2-inch ovals and place on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Cool the pastries on a wire rack.
7. Meanwhile, in a saucepan, combine the sugar, honey, and water. Bring to a boil and simmer gently for 5 minutes.
8. Dip the cooled pastries into the warm syrup and sprinkle with chopped walnuts.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
